subject: fix double commit processing
title: Fixed duplicate commits in changelog
summary: The build process was sometimes processing the same commit twice, causing duplicates in the changelog. Cleaned up the logic to prevent this.

subject: collapse nav items to more
title: Navigation menu collapse for mobile
summary: Reorganized the nav to tuck away extra items behind a "more" button on smaller screens, keeping the header cleaner on mobile devices.

title: Navigation menu collapse to "more"
summary: Reorganized the navigation to hide secondary items behind a "more" dropdown on smaller screens. Keeps the header cleaner without sacrificing access to anything.

subject: add automated changelog
title: Automated changelog from git commits
summary: Built a system to auto-generate changelog entries from commits. Now I can add a note about changes directly in git, and it'll show up here without manual updates.

title: Automated changelog tracking
summary: Set up a system to automatically generate changelog entries from git commits. Now when I commit with a special format, the changelog page updates without manual editing.

subject: redesign error pages
title: Error pages redesigned
summary: Gave the 404 and error pages a visual refresh. They're less boring now.

title: Error pages redesigned
summary: Redesigned the 404 and error pages to be more useful and hopefully a bit less sad to land on. They're not just a dead end anymore.

subject: fix older card truncation
title: Fixed blog card truncation
summary: Older blog post cards were getting cut off. Quick one-liner fix in the display logic.

title: Fixed older card truncation
summary: Older blog post cards were getting cut off. Quick one-liner fix in the BlogPost component.

subject: prev/next post
title: Added prev/next navigation on blog posts
summary: Blog posts now have navigation links to jump to the previous or next post in chronological order. Makes it easier to browse through the archive without going back to the main list.

title: Navigation between blog posts
summary: Added prev/next post links at the bottom of blog posts so you can browse through the archive without going back to the index.

subject: copy email toast
title: Email copy notification toast
summary: Added a toast notification that appears when you copy my email address. Small UX thing to give feedback without being annoying.

title: Toast notification component
summary: Added a toast component that shows when you copy your email. It's a small detail but makes the copy-to-clipboard action feel more responsive.

subject: add error states
title: Error states for API integrations
summary: Added fallback UI for when GitHub, Spotify, and Strava data fails to load. Components now show graceful error messages instead of breaking.

title: Error states for API failures
summary: Added proper error handling across GitHub, Spotify, and Strava integrations so pages don't break when API calls fail.

subject: better sentry errors
title: Improved error tracking
summary: Better error context in Sentry logs. Added more instrumentation to catch issues earlier and make debugging easier.

title: Improved error reporting in Sentry
summary: Refactored error handling to get better insights into what's actually breaking. Instrument initialization changes should help surface more useful stack traces.

subject: more sentry
title: Added Sentry error tracking
summary: Integrated Sentry across several API routes to better track and monitor errors in production.

title: Added Sentry error tracking
summary: Set up Sentry across multiple API endpoints for better error monitoring and debugging. Now tracking issues on the GitHub, Spotify, Strava, and OG image generation endpoints.

subject: add sentry
title: Added error tracking with Sentry
summary: Integrated Sentry for error monitoring and performance tracking. This should help me catch bugs in production that I'd otherwise miss.

title: Added error tracking with Sentry
summary: Set up Sentry to catch and monitor runtime errors on the site. Now I'll actually know when things break in production.

subject: fix chunk load error after deploy
title: Fixed chunk loading errors
summary: Added an error boundary and recovery logic to handle chunk load failures after deployments. This should prevent blank pages when asset versions get out of sync.

title: Fixed chunk load errors
summary: After deploying with code splitting, the site was crashing when loading certain chunks. Added error handling to catch and display these failures gracefully instead of just breaking the page.

subject: fix running loading state
title: Fixed running page loading state
summary: The running page wasn't handling its loading state correctly. Refactored the component to fix it.

title: Fixed running page loading state
summary: The Running page was showing a loading indicator at the wrong time. Fixed the timing so it only appears while data is actually being fetched.

subject: add rss
title: Added RSS feed for blog posts
summary: You can now subscribe to the blog with an RSS reader. The feed updates whenever I publish a new post.

title: RSS feed for blog posts
summary: Added an RSS feed so you can subscribe to new blog posts with your favorite reader. It's automatically generated when the site builds.

subject: remove orange dots
title: Removed orange dots from site
summary: Got rid of some orange dot UI elements that were scattered across various pages. They were a bit too much visual noise.

title: Removed orange dots from pages
summary: Cleaned up some visual elements that were scattered across the site. They seemed to be lingering from an earlier design iteration and weren't doing much.

subject: always use gradient title
title: Gradient titles everywhere
summary: Made the gradient title styling consistent across all pages. Now every page title gets the gradient treatment instead of just some of them.

title: Gradient titles everywhere
summary: Made page titles consistently use gradient styling across the site instead of mixing different styles.

subject: add contributions to cmdk
title: Added contributions to cmdk
summary: Added a CommandPalette component that integrates with cmdk, a command menu library. Gives the site a keyboard-accessible command palette for quick navigation.

title: Added contributions to cmdk
summary: Built and integrated a command palette component using the cmdk library, adding keyboard-driven navigation to the site.

subject: github loading state
title: GitHub contributions loading state
summary: Added a skeleton loading animation while fetching GitHub contributions data. It's a small thing, but beats staring at an empty space while the API responds.

title: GitHub contributions loading state
summary: Added a loading state for the GitHub contributions section so it doesn't look broken while fetching data.

subject: add github contributions
title: GitHub contributions section
summary: Added a new section to the home page that displays your GitHub contributions. It pulls data from the GitHub API to show your recent activity.

title: GitHub contributions on homepage
summary: Added a live widget that shows my GitHub contributions graph on the home page. It pulls data from the GitHub API and displays the last year of activity.

subject: fix mobile nav
title: Mobile navigation fixed
summary: Rewrote the mobile nav component to actually work properly. It was getting pretty messy and needed some love.

title: Mobile navigation actually works now
summary: Rewrote the mobile nav component because it was kind of broken. Should be more reliable on smaller screens now.

subject: add strava
title: Added Strava running stats page
summary: Connected my Strava account to pull in running data and activity history. There's now a dedicated running page with stats and maps if you're curious what I've been up to.

title: Added Strava running stats
summary: Integrated Strava API to pull running activity data. New /running page shows stats, maps, and activity details fetched directly from Strava.

subject: now playing loading state
title: Now playing shows a loading state
summary: Added a loading spinner while fetching what's currently playing from Spotify. No more awkward blank space while the API request is in flight.

title: Now playing loading state
summary: Added a loading indicator to the now playing section while spotify data is being fetched, so it doesn't just sit there blank.

subject: better map loading
title: Streamlined map component
summary: Refactored the WorldMap component to load more efficiently. Cut about a third of the code by simplifying how it handles rendering.

title: Simplified map component logic
summary: Refactored the WorldMap component to load more efficiently, cutting the code size roughly in half while keeping the same functionality.

subject: cmdk fixes
title: Command palette fixes and improvements
summary: Fixed several issues with the command palette component and improved its styling. The palette should now feel more responsive and behave better in edge cases.

title: Command palette improvements
summary: Fixed some bugs in the command palette and tweaked the styling. It should feel more responsive now.

subject: fallback to recently played
title: Spotify now playing fallback
summary: If nothing's currently playing, the now playing widget now shows your most recent track instead of staying empty. Handy when you've paused for a bit.

title: Spotify fallback to recently played
summary: Now playing widget now shows your most recently played track if nothing's currently playing, so you'll always see something instead of a blank state.

subject: fix duplicate polling
title: Fixed duplicate Spotify polling
summary: The now playing widget was hitting the Spotify API twice per interval. Refactored to consolidate polling logic and avoid redundant requests.

title: Fixed duplicate Spotify API polling
summary: Was hitting the Spotify API twice per poll interval. Refactored the polling logic to centralize it in App.tsx so the data flows down to components instead of each one requesting independently.

subject: now playing
title: Now playing widget redesign
summary: Rebuilt the now playing component with styling and added some vite config updates to support it. Much improved visually and functionally.

title: Now playing widget
summary: Built a new component that shows what I'm currently listening to. Hooked it up to pull live data and styled it to fit the site.

subject: loads of updates
title: World map and Spotify integration
summary: Added an interactive world map showing travel history, plus a now-playing widget that pulls from Spotify. Also refactored the site layout and navigation along the way.

title: Added world map and now playing widget
summary: Built out a bunch of new features including an interactive world map, a now playing component that integrates with Spotify, and added travel data tracking. Also set up the auth scripts needed to keep everything connected.

subject: add map data
title: Map data generation script
summary: Added a build script that generates map unit data. This sets up the foundation for displaying map visualizations on the site.

title: Added map units data
summary: Built a script to generate map unit data and added it to the public assets. This powers whatever map feature is being built.

subject: og images
title: Added dynamic Open Graph images
summary: Built a simple OG image generator so each page now has its own custom preview image when shared on social media.

title: Added open graph image generation
summary: Built a dynamic OG image generator so posts get nice preview cards when shared on social media or messaging apps.

subject: add vercel analytics
title: Added Vercel analytics tracking
summary: Set up Vercel Analytics to get some visibility into how people are using the site. Curious to see what actually gets visited.

title: Added Vercel analytics
summary: Integrated Vercel's analytics to track visitor data and see what content folks are actually checking out.

subject: cap number of posts on home page
title: Capped posts on homepage
summary: The home page now shows a limited number of posts instead of loading everything at once. Should help with performance as the archive grows.

title: Limited posts on home page
summary: The home page now only shows the most recent posts instead of everything. Should keep things snappier as the archive grows.

subject: animate timeline
title: Timeline animations added
summary: Added some animations to the timeline component. Makes scrolling through it a bit more pleasant to look at.

title: Timeline now has animations
summary: Added fade-in and stagger animations to the timeline component. Each event now animates in as the page loads, making it feel a bit more polished.

subject: diss
title: Added dissertation PDF
summary: Uploaded my dissertation as a downloadable PDF. It's now available on the site for anyone who wants to read it.

title: Added dissertation PDF
summary: Published my dissertation as a downloadable PDF on the site. It's about 1.4 MB, so fair warning if you're on a slow connection.

title: Mobile navigation fixed
summary: The mobile nav wasn't working properly on smaller screens. Got that sorted out.

title: Complete website redesign
summary: Migrated from Next.js to a Vite-based React setup. New design with command palette, improved navigation, and simplified architecture overall.

title: Added incident.io to timeline
summary: Updated the timeline to include incident.io, documenting another tool or service I've been working with.

title: Updated bio to mention incident.io
summary: Added incident.io to my bio. Currently working there and thought it deserved a mention.

title: Fixed text selection color
summary: The text selection highlight now uses the right color. It was bothering me more than it probably should have.

title: Added CV as downloadable PDF
summary: Added a CV PDF to the site so people can download my résumé. Handy for when folks want something more formal than what's on the main site.

title: Made timeline logos clickable
summary: The company and project logos on the timeline now link to their websites. Makes it easier to jump around and check things out.

title: Timeline and author section updates
summary: Updated the timeline component with more details and refreshed the author section with a new photo.

title: Supabase pausing prevention guide
summary: Published a blog post about preventing Supabase projects from pausing during inactivity, including strategies to keep free-tier projects alive.

title: Blog posts now statically cached
summary: Removed the force dynamic setting from blog posts, which means they'll be statically generated and cached instead of regenerated on every request.

title: RSC streaming with Suspense
summary: Added streaming for React Server Components on blog posts using Suspense. The like button now loads independently without blocking the page.

title: Prevent Supabase project from pausing
summary: Added a health check endpoint that pings the API regularly, keeping the Supabase project active so it doesn't go idle.

title: Fixed hydration mismatch with localStorage
summary: Added a ClientOnly wrapper component to prevent Next.js hydration errors when accessing localStorage. This fixes the like button on blog posts.

title: Set metadata base URL
summary: Fixed the base URL in page metadata so social share previews and canonical links work correctly.

title: Post likes feature
summary: Added the ability to like blog posts. Each post now has a heart button that persists likes to the database.

title: Set up local development database
summary: Added Docker Compose setup for a local dev database so I can develop offline without hitting external services.

title: Added metadata to blog posts
summary: Blog posts now include metadata like publish date and reading time. Makes each post feel a bit more intentional.

title: Wrote about rendering rich markdown tables
summary: Added a post on rendering rich markdown table cells with custom components. Includes some experiments with handling complex content inside markdown tables.

title: Markdown emoji support
summary: Added support for markdown emojis in posts and pages. Now you can use :smile: and similar shortcuts instead of pasting unicode directly.

title: Made blog text smaller
summary: Dialed down the font size on blog posts. It was a bit too large.

title: Fixed inline code styling
summary: Tweaked the Tailwind config to fix how inline code looks throughout the site. Nothing major, just making sure it's consistent.

title: Fixed layout width issue
summary: The main layout was rendering wider than intended on some screens. Tweaked the width constraints in the layout component to fix it.

title: Added typed route validation
summary: Set up Next.js typed routes to catch route mismatches at compile time. Should prevent a whole class of link-breaking bugs.

title: Added Web Vitals monitoring
summary: Integrated a speed insights library to track Core Web Vitals. Mostly curious to see how the site actually performs in the wild rather than just in local dev.

title: Added analytics tracking
summary: Set up analytics on the site to start tracking visitor behavior and page performance.

title: Updated downsizing post
summary: Expanded the downsizing post with more content and thoughts on the topic. Added a few more sections and refined existing material.

title: Images now zoom on hover
summary: Added a little hover effect to blog post grid images so they scale up slightly. Makes the grid feel more interactive.

title: Show unpublished posts in dev
summary: Unpublished posts now show up when running the site locally, making it easier to draft and preview content before publishing.

title: Draft post support
summary: Added a drafts system so I can publish posts-in-progress without them showing up on the blog yet. Currently working on posts about downsizing and a fake GPT thing.

title: Fixed mobile layout issues
summary: Tweaked some spacing and sizing on the homepage and talk list components to look better on smaller screens.

title: Now playing auto-refreshes
summary: The now playing widget updates automatically in the background instead of requiring a page refresh to see what I'm listening to.

title: Updated Nx talk content
summary: Updated the content and details for the Nx monorepo talk, including minor tweaks to how it's displayed on the site.

title: Extracted social icons component
summary: Pulled social media icons out into a reusable component. Now used in both the footer and author bio section.

title: Fixed stale Spotify data
summary: The site was sometimes showing outdated Spotify listening data. Added a cache invalidation to make sure it refreshes properly.

title: Added talks section
summary: Built out a speaking page with individual talk pages. Added a new talk about building maintainable JavaScript monorepos with Nx.

title: Extracted Timeline component
summary: Moved timeline rendering logic out of the main page into its own component to keep things cleaner.

title: Now playing widget
summary: Added a now playing widget powered by Spotify API that shows what I'm currently listening to in the footer.

title: Added about the author box
summary: Blog posts now have a little bio box at the bottom so people know who's writing these things.
